zh.lifeSummary: 當Emma de Conteville於大約1029年出生在法國巴-諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯孔特維爾時，她的父親Herluin de Conteville29歲，母親Herleva de Falaise27歲。她和Richard le Goz Viscount of Avranches至少有1個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於1103年7月3日在法國諾門迪曼其阿福朗徹斯享年75歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Emma de Conteville于大约1029年出生在法国巴-諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯孔特維爾时，她的父亲Herluin de Conteville29岁，母亲Herleva de Falaise27岁。她和Richard le Goz Viscount of Avranches至少有1个儿子和3个女儿。她去世于1103年7月3日在法国諾門迪曼其阿福朗徹斯享年75岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Emma
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of compound names such as Ermintrude containing the word erm(en), irm(en) ‘entire’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, but its popularity in medieval England was greatly enhanced by the fact that it had been borne by the mother of Edward the Confessor, herself a Norman. In modern times, it was only in moderate use early in the 20th century but rose sharply in favour in the 1970s and has since remained perennially popular.

en.lifeSummary: When Emma de Conteville was born about 1029, in Conteville, Calvados, Lower Normandy, France, her father, Herluin de Conteville, was 29 and her mother, Herleva de Falaise, was 27. She had at least 1 son and 3 daughters with Richard le Goz Viscount of Avranches. She died on 3 July 1103, in Avranches, Manche, Normandy, France, at the age of 75.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Emma de Conteville est née environ 1029, à Conteville, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, France, son père, Herluin de Conteville, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Herleva de Falaise, avait 27 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles avec Richard le Goz Viscount of Avranches. Elle est décédée le 3 juillet 1103, à Avranches, Manche, Normandie, France, à l’âge de 75 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Emma de Conteville um 1029 in Conteville, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Herluin de Conteville 29 und ihre Mutter Herleva de Falaise 27. Sie hatte mit Richard le Goz Viscount of Avranches mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 3. Juli 1103 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Avranches, Manche, Normandie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Emma de Conteville è nata il circa 1029 nel Conteville, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Francia, sua padre, Herluin de Conteville, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Herleva de Falaise, aveva 27 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie con Richard le Goz Viscount of Avranches. Morì il 3 luglio 1103, nel Avranches, Manche, Normandie, Francia, all'età di 75 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Emma de Contevilleが約1029年にフランスバセ-ノーマンディカルヴァドスコンテヴィルで生まれた時，父Herluin de Contevilleは29歳，母Herleva de Falaiseは27歳であった。彼女はRichard le Goz Viscount of Avranchesとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1103年7月3日にフランスノーマンディマンチェアvランチェスで75歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Emma de Conteville(이)가 대략 1029년 프랑스 배세-노먼디 캘바도스 콘테빌에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Herluin de Conteville(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Herleva de Falaise(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 Richard le Goz Viscount of Avranches(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1103년 7월 3일 프랑스 노먼디 먼체 아브랭체스에서 75세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.St Werburghs Abbey, Chester, Cheshire, E: Chester, Legeceasterscir, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Emma de Conteville nasceu aproximadamente 1029, em Conteville, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, França, seu pai, Herluin de Conteville, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Herleva de Falaise, tinha 27 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas com Richard le Goz Viscount of Avranches. Ela faleceu em 3 de julho de 1103, em Avranches, Manche, Normandie, França, com 75 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Emma de Conteville родилась около 1029 г. в местности контевилл, калвадос, бассе-норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени Herluin de Conteville было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Herleva de Falaise, 27. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери от Richard le Goz Viscount of Avranches. Она умерла 3 июля 1103 г. в местности авранчесь, манч, норманди, Франция в возрасте 75 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Emma de Conteville nació aproximadamente 1029, en Conteville, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Francia, su papá, Herluin de Conteville, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Herleva de Falaise, tenía 27 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas con Richard le Goz Viscount of Avranches. Murió el 3 de julio de 1103, en Avranches, Manche, Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 75 años.
